description: Sentence-centered JSON dataset for the toy cave-script project, restructured with mixed surface-order categories A-G while preserving meanings and cave-art links.

notes.student_view_purpose: Can be exposed to students or models during decipherment-style work without revealing meanings directly.
notes.instructor_view_purpose: Contains translations, glosses, and semantic structure for dataset generation, checking, and later supervised tasks.
notes.panel_linking: A sentence may be linked to a cave-art panel caption, or it may be marked as a loose inscription with no surviving adjacent panel.
